description:
Reframed from the original "per-condition flows" — the deep clinical intake now happens inside MDI's embedded UI. Our intake page is intentionally minimal: it picks the condition, runs the state gate (T-020), runs the prefilter (T-021), and routes forward.

**Scope**
- `src/app/(app)/onboarding/intake/page.tsx` — server component renders the condition picker + state field (pre-filled from `user_profiles.state` if known).
- Server action `submitIntake` runs `canServeStateForCondition` + `prefilter`, persists nothing PHI-shaped, and either redirects to `/onboarding/payment` or to a friendly fail page.
- Honor RULES.md typography (Patient Floor ≥16px / target 17-18px), Two-Voice color, plain-spoken voice per PRODUCT.md.

**Out of scope**
- The deep clinical questionnaire (MDI embedded URL, rendered on `/dashboard/cases/[id]` post-handoff).
- File uploads (MDI handles in case workflow).

**Acceptance**
- Three paths tested: happy → `/onboarding/payment`; unsupported state → fail page + audit; failed prefilter → fail page + audit.
- No PHI persisted at this step (answers are in-memory only — only the outcome is logged).
title: Intake UI (minimal): condition selection + state gate + prefilter
